name: College of Information Technology
cardDesc: Develop technical expertise in software, networks, and digital systems for today's fast-evolving technology landscape.
modalDesc: The College of Information Technology prepares students for successful careers in the dynamic tech industry. Our programs combine theoretical foundations with practical hands-on experience using cutting-edge tools and technologies. Graduates work with leading IT companies as software developers, systems architects, data scientists, and cybersecurity professionals.

name: College of Engineering
cardDesc: Build, innovate, and solve real-world problems through rigorous engineering education and hands-on training.
modalDesc: Our Engineering programs are accredited and recognized nationally. Students gain expertise in design, analysis, and implementation of engineering solutions for infrastructure, energy, manufacturing, and innovation projects. State-of-the-art laboratories and partnerships with major engineering firms provide real-world project experience.

name: College of Business & Management
cardDesc: Equip future leaders with business acumen, entrepreneurial thinking, and global management principles.
modalDesc: Prepare for leadership roles in corporate, entrepreneurial, and public sectors. Our business programs emphasize case studies, business simulations, and internships with top companies. Graduates become managers, entrepreneurs, accountants, and business consultants worldwide.

name: College of Health Sciences
cardDesc: Train compassionate health professionals in evidence-based practice, clinical skills, and patient-centered care.
modalDesc: Our health sciences programs produce skilled professionals committed to patient care and public health. With simulation labs, clinical training partnerships with hospitals, and research opportunities, graduates become nurses, pharmacists, medical technologists, and physical therapists serving communities.

name: College of Education
cardDesc: Shape skilled educators committed to learner-centered and inclusive quality teaching across all levels.
modalDesc: Develop as a transformative educator with expertise in curriculum design, student assessment, and inclusive teaching methods. Our programs are recognized by DepEd and international education bodies. Graduates teach in public and private schools, and pursue advanced education careers.

name: College of Arts & Sciences
cardDesc: Explore humanities, social sciences, and natural sciences to develop critical thinking and broad perspectives.
modalDesc: Develop comprehensive understanding of human society, behavior, and the natural world. Our programs foster critical thinking, research skills, and global perspectives. Graduates work in education, counseling, communications, research, government, and non-profit sectors.
